title: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Freeport-McMoRan using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what FCX is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-of2d65mp>
Copper is critical for the energy transition. We expect continued strong demand and pricing power. However, mining is capital intensive and subject to inflation. 8% FCF growth balances strong top-line potential with rising operational costs.
